rulings.Case Title: MELANIE LARKIN ET AL VS. MOHAMED MARLEEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 22, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF MELANIE LARKIN, RICHARD SMITH Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration DENIED without prejudice. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Mr. Marleen individually may be compelled to arbitration. Authorities cited by the moving party are factually distinguishable. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MELANIE LARKIN ET AL VS. MOHAMED MARLEEN ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 22, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF MELANIE LARKIN, RICHARD SMITH Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRENT MARSH VS. MICHAEL CAMPESINO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 22, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The operative Three Day Notice cannot support an unlawful detainer action by the master tenant against the sub-tenant as it is based (as is suggested in the Notice and confirmed by the Plaintiff in opposition 2:14-15) exclusively on the alleged breach of the master lease. Plaintiff does not allege any facts in his third amended complaint to indicate that Defendant was bound by any terms of the master lease, was a party to it, or was even privy to its provisions. Plaintiff further fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a subtenancy may be terminated by the master tenant due to breaches of the master lease. Plaintiff correctly points out that the allegations in the Notice could have supported a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on a breach of a sub tenancy agreement. However, since Plaintiff asserts and admits that the Notice is not based on such breaches, the Notice cannot support a cause of action for unlawful detainer against the subtenant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One; Form Interrogatories, Set No One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One Propounded On Deborah Williams; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities
